allow: Bash(node -e "const winRate = parseFloat\('0.0'\); const tieRate = parseFloat\('0.0'\); const loseRate = parseFloat\('100.0'\); console.log\('winRate:', winRate, 'NaN?', isNaN\(winRate\)\); console.log\('CSS:', \\`\\${winRate}%\\`\); console.log\('With NaN:', \\`\\${parseFloat\('NaN'\)}%\\`\);")
